rulings.Case Title: JOHN GUERIN et al VS. MARIA VICTORIA LUIS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Setting Aside And Vacating Default And Default Judgment And Granting Deft Leave To Defend
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, July 27, 2010, line 5, DEFENDANT MARIA LUIS Motion For Order Setting Aside And Vacating Default And Default Judgment And Granting Defendant Leave To Defend. GRANTED, PROPOSED ANSWER MUST BE FILED ON OR BEFORE JULY 28, 2010. DEFENDANT'S NEGLECT EXCUSABLE IN VIEW OF HER COMMUNINCATIONS WITH PLAINTIFFS AND THEIR COUNSEL. THE COURT FAVORS ADJUDICATING CASES ON THE MERITS. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH FESTINESE AND MONIQUE MODESTE FESTINESE et al VS. JEAN JUDNICK
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, July 27, 2010, line 6, PLAINTIFFS JOSEPH FESTINESE AND MONIQUE MODESTE FESTINESE, INNOCENTE CASSOLATO, TRUSTEE OF THE INNOCENTE CASSOLATO 1991 LIVING TRUST MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED IN PART. MOTION IMPROPERLY SEEKS TO ADJUDICATE SEPARATE ISSUES OF FACT AND DOES NOT COMPLETELY DISPOSE OF A CAUSE OF ACTION, AN AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE, A CLAIM FOR DAMAGES, OR AN ISSUE OF DUTY. (SEE CCP SECTION 437c(f)(1).) THE NOTICE OF MOTION DOES NOT STATE THE SPECIFIC CAUSE OF ACTION, AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE, CLAIMS FOR DAMAGES, OR ISSUES OF DUTY, AND REPEAT THEM, VERBATIM, IN THE SEPARATE STATEMENT OF UNDISPUTED MATERIAL FACTS. (SEE CRC 3.1350(b). MOTION IS GRANTED, HOWEVER, AS TO INTERLOCUTORY JUDGMENT AND COURT ORDERS PARTITION PURSUANT TO AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. THE PROCEEDS WILL BE HELD IN ESCROW PENDING DETERMINATION OF THE PARTIES' INTERESTS. THE COURT DENIES WITHOUT PREJUDICE, THE REQUEST TO APPOINT REFEREE WHICH MAY BE THE SUBJECT OF FUTURE MOTION. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: MINOTT WESSINGER AS TRUSTEE OF THE MINOTT VS. EDWARD KAVOUNAS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, July 27, 2010, line 7, PLAINTIFF MINOTT WESSINGER'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT. AS A PRELIMINARY MATTER, THE 2ND AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT MUST BE FILED WITH THE COURT. DEMURRER WITHDRAWN AS TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION (NUISANCE). CROSS-COMPLAINANTS TO PLEAD FACTS REGARDING HOW THE UNPERMITTED WORK IS INJURIOUS TO THEIR HEALTH, OFFENSIVE, OR INTERFERES WITH THE USE OF THEIR PROPERTY WITHIN THE MEANING OF CC SECTION 3479. =(302/CWW)
